encounters.trigger: Burning the tapestry reveals a hidden stairwell leading to the Iron Crypts.
The Golem shatters, triggering a pressure plate that opens the gate to the Altar of Void.
The Sentinel dies, causing the altar to collapse and revealing the path to the Boss throne room.
encounters.hazard: Void rifts that damage health over time.

objective: Purge the temple of its dark corruption.

boss.name: Obsidian Lich
boss.victory_condition: Channel the Amulet to freeze the Lich's core before the clock runs out.

setting: An ominous, decaying cathedral suspended in a void dimension.
